description: Soft cloth baby doll — sewing and cleaning.
itemDetails:
This soft cloth baby doll is part of the rag-doll and first-baby-doll tradition widely sold in nursery and toddler lines from the 1980s onward. These dolls are designed for early comfort play and are typically non-fragile and machine-friendly.

Materials commonly include cotton/poly cloth bodies, yarn hair, embroidered faces, and polyester fiber fill. Market value is generally practical and sentimental unless the doll is traceable to a premium maker with identifiable tags and original accessories.
